articles.title: Mercedes’ electric AMG GT 4-door coupe can go 0-60 in 2 seconds
articles.description: The era of ultra-high performance Mercedes EVs is here. The German automaker finally revealed its new super sedan, the AMG GT 4-door coupe, with technology borrowed from the automaker's XX concept that last year made history by driving 24,901 miles in under 8 days at Nardò Ring in southern Italy. With the production model, Mercedes […]
articles.author: Andrew J. Hawkins
